identity_contract.lineage_policy: new products require a new particle_id, parent_particle_id and generation

coordinate_transform.mapping_summary: RF +z -> oa-TOF +x, RF +x -> oa-TOF +y, RF +y -> oa-TOF +z; handoff center maps to the current oa-TOF source center

canonical_fields.instrument_time_us: absolute time on the shared instrument clock
canonical_fields.lineage_age_us: elapsed time since the root source particle was created; inherited by reaction products
canonical_fields.particle_age_us: elapsed time since the current particle entity was created; reset for a reaction product
canonical_fields.last_component_elapsed_time_us: elapsed time in the component that produced this handoff

propagation_rule.reaction_product: create a new particle_id with parent_particle_id and generation+1; retain instrument_time and lineage_age at creation, reset particle_age to zero

current_rf_source_mapping.assumption: the present standalone RF run creates the root particles at the RF source
current_rf_source_mapping.upgrade_before_upstream_components: the RF input and particle_state contract must accept entry instrument_time_us, lineage_age_us and particle_age_us, then emit a distinct RF component elapsed time

solver_local_time_policy.static_fields: a solver may rebase each particle to local zero only if the per-particle instrument time is retained and restored in downstream analysis
solver_local_time_policy.time_dependent_fields: use instrument time directly or apply an exactly equivalent clock and phase offset; an unqualified reset to zero is forbidden

required_before_runtime: physical drift, aperture and injection-lens geometry
proof that the projected particles can enter the oa-TOF source region without an unmodeled electrostatic barrier

evidence.selected_chain: RF-COMSOL hybrid end hmax 0.5 mm -> rigid phase-space projection -> oaTOF-SIMION Formal static analyzer
evidence.qualification_summary: the selected low-cost chain transmits 96/100 particles; the 0.25 mm RF reference transmits 97/100, with one percentage point sensitivity and unchanged detector-r99 classification

superseded_cross_solver_upstream_diagnos.interpretation: RF-COMSOL and RF-SIMION exit ensembles differed substantially; this remains diagnostic evidence but is not a blocker for the selected RF-COMSOL chain

shared_clock_pulse_functional.waveform_scope: one ideal-edged 1 us rectangular pulse after continuous time-ordered entry and pre-pulse flight
shared_clock_pulse_functional.claim_limit: Functional projected chain only; physical entry opening, connector field, finite edge rise/fall and N=1000 resolution remain deferred.

derived_solver_inputs.canonical_handoff_csv: authoritative transformed particle state and chain clock
derived_solver_inputs.oatof_ion: derived 11-column fixed-particle table; solver birth time is local and particle identity is preserved by the row map
derived_solver_inputs.row_map_csv: stable link between solver row order, particle identity and canonical time
derived_solver_inputs.metadata_json: input, contract and output SHA-256 plus projection diagnostics
